Dyn_DNN4OPF\\models\\adp_den_2head.py.text: ADP-DEN  (mask-free version) — with *patience on width expansion*
Allow up to N failed expansions (patience) before rolling back and stopping.
Patience knobs (read from config via .get with defaults):
On failure within patience: keep capacity (no rollback) and attempt another expansion.
On patience exhausted: rollback architecture+weights to pre_exp_* and stop expanding.
# Patience knobs (dict-like .get with default; fallback if missing)
(add `ex_k` neurons to fc1 and to each branch fc2). Use patience-on-expansion
# ───── Plateau reached → start a *series* of width expansions with patience ─────
# Attempt multiple expansions until accept or patience exhausts
# If max_epochs hit during widened training, decide vs. baseline and exit

Dyn_DNN4OPF\\models\\adp_den_2head_depth.text: Allow up to N failed expansions (patience) before rolling back and stopping.
Patience knobs (read from config via .get with defaults):
On failure within patience: keep capacity (no rollback) and attempt another expansion.
On patience exhausted: rollback architecture+weights to pre_exp_* and stop expanding.
# Patience knobs (dict-like .get with default; fallback if missing)
(append one hidden layer to fc1 and to each branch fc2). Use patience
# ───── Plateau reached → start a *series* of depth expansions with patience ─────
# Attempt multiple expansions until accept or patience exhausts
# If max_epochs hit during deep training, pick better of deep vs baseline and exit

Dyn_DNN4OPF\\models\\adp_den_2_head_widt.text: ADP-DEN (2-head: PQ + VM) — width-only expansion with patience
• Inner loop: early-stopping on MSE (patience = self.patience).
• Expansion patience: allow up to `trials_depth` failures; then rollback architecture & weights to pre-expansion baseline.
Config keys respected: delta, trials_depth, max_neurons, patience, ex_k (new; default 16)

Dyn_DNN4OPF\\models\\adp_den_4head_depth.text: • Patience    : allow up to `trials_depth` consecutive failed expansions
Patience: allow up to `trials_depth` consecutive failed expansions,

Dyn_DNN4OPF\\models\\adp_den_4head_expan.text: • Patience    : allow up to N consecutive failed width expansions before rollback
- On failure within patience: keep the added capacity and immediately try another
- On patience exhaustion: rollback to pre-expansion snapshot and stop expanding.
Outer loop  : progressive **width** expansions with patience.
On failure within patience: keep width and try another expansion.
On patience exhaustion: rollback to pre-exp snapshot and stop.

Dyn_DNN4OPF\\models\\adp_den_4_head_widt.text: • Patience on expansion: allow up to `trials_depth` failures, then rollback to last accepted.
Config keys respected: delta, trials_depth, max_neurons, patience, ex_k (new; default 16)
Patience: allow up to `trials_depth` consecutive failed expansions before rollback.

#  ADP‑Depth: adaptive depth‑&‑width expanding network with expansion patience
"""Adaptive network that first expands *depth* (with patience), then tries
width sweeps for the current depth (with its own patience). Stops when neither helps.
# ── WIDTH SWEEPS at current depth with patience ────────────────────

Dyn_DNN4OPF\\models\\adp_depth_2head.py.text: *   `max_epochs` is a **global budget** across all calls; the function
width sweeps for the current depth. Adds **patience on expansion** for both
OUTER loop   → progressive **depth** series with patience.
INNER loop   → at each accepted depth level, try **width** sweeps with patience.

Dyn_DNN4OPF\\models\\adp_depth_4head.py.text: *   `max_epochs` is a **global budget** across all calls; the function
#  ADP-Depth: adaptive depth-&-width expanding network (+ expansion patience)
width sweeps for the current depth. Adds **patience on expansion** for both
OUTER loop   → progressive **depth** series with patience.
INNER loop   → at each accepted depth level, try **width** sweeps with patience.

Dyn_DNN4OPF\\models\\adp_width.py.text: *   `max_epochs` is a **global budget** across all calls; the function
#  ADP-Width: adaptive width-first network with patience on width & depth
and after each accepted width step, tries **depth** sweeps (also patience-controlled).
Stops when width patience is exhausted or capacity guards trip.
# ── After each accepted width, run a DEPTH series with patience ──

depth sweeps at the current width. Adds **patience on expansion** for both
